name: Bayerische Motoren Werke AG
description: Bayerische Motoren Werke AG, commonly known as BMW, is a German multinational manufacturer of luxury vehicles and motorcycles. Headquartered in Munich, Bavaria, the company operates globally with a portfolio that includes the BMW, MINI, Rolls-Royce, and BMW Motorrad brands. BMW is renowned for its focus on premium quality, performance, and technological innovation, and it is actively transitioning its lineup toward electric mobility and sustainable production practices across its global manufacturing network.
